raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX I stayed at the XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, for XXXX nights, XXXX XXXX XXXX. My hotel reservations were prepaid in full through XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. When I arrived at the hotel on the evening of the XXXX, a hotel deposit was asked of me. They took a pending charge of {$250.00}. After returning home, this pending amount was charged my card. I disputed this charge with Citibank, but my claim was denied. However I now have written confirmation through an email acknowledging that the charge was made in error. I escalated this issue with Citibank six times through phone calls and a certified letter but have been denied each time without any proof or effort to contact the hotel.
